steps.t: Ghai-buri-Sêk can be found outside the mountain pass in north-east Agarnaith. You should talk to Ghai-buri-Sêk.
Parsâ-dhug-Bhêr, the chieftain of the Red Sky Clan, can be found in the village Bhol Rûdh. You should find Parsâ-dhug-Bhêr.
